title: Audio Signal Processing in the Artificial Intelligence Era: Challenges and Directions
reviewer_notes: Broad 2025 JAES survey/position paper on AI for audio engineering; highly relevant to audio ML and useful as a bridge across audio DSP, ML systems, human-centered AI, real-time constraints, effects/synthesis/mixing/spatial/speech/music applications. Bridge-like, but partial because it is a broad field overview rather than a specific cross-cluster technical method.
